text.tspan: Tiered authorization · layered recovery · zero-lockout guarantee
- Turning OFF is always instant (no auth) — you can silence Nova mid-call.
- Turning ON requires PIN or Windows Hello (prevents covert re-enable by a bystander).
- When OFF: mic released (LED confirms), wake-word stopped, hotkeys unregistered
- Reminders and low-battery alerts still fire (non-intrusive, no voice).
